race.comment: INTOXICATING (5) will find this much easier than recent efforts where she's been racing in town. Now right back to country level and she's been moved to the Forrester stable. Back to 1000m now may be the query, but she creates plenty of interest in this event. RIVER BEAUTY (6) won well two back before a big defeat here last time when on the quick turnaround. Blinkers come off now and she comes back to 1000m. Won't be far away. GOLDEN OPERA (7) finished sixth over 1100m at Dongara at her most recent appearance on April 4. Definite top-three chance. HILLSIDE MONARCH (4) progressed nicely last time out at the second run of the campaign to finish just 1.75 lengths from the winner in third over 1200m at this track. Suitably placed so she can figure again. HOT NOVA (10) is better than she showed last start and is worth including.
